summary: Implement i18n system with locale loading (embedded YAML), key lookup with fallback, and runtime language switching. Supports Chinese (default) and English with thread-safe concurrent access via sync.RWMutex.
keyDecisions: Used embed.FS for locale YAML files to avoid runtime file dependencies
Lazy loading with ensureLoaded() that checks loaded flag under RLock before acquiring write lock
Fixed deadlock bug: ensureLoaded uses RLock/RUnlock pattern before calling loadAll (which acquires Lock)
reset() helper in tests forces reload by clearing loaded flag under mutex

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: T(key string) string, SetLocale(code string) error, CurrentLocale() string implemented
Unknown locale code returns error; unknown key falls back to key itself
Unit tests: locale loading, key lookup, fallback, switch

notes: Deadlock bug was fixed in main session: ensureLoaded was being called inside locked sections. Fixed by using RLock/RUnlock to check loaded flag before calling loadAll.
